nodes.text:
Progressive anaemia symptoms with new onset rectal bleeding; fatigue over 7 weeks. Additional symptoms include early satiety. Past medical history significant for hypertension.

Colonoscopy – mass in rectum 

Imaging:
MRI rectum on 15/04/2024: large polypoid lesion T1 sm1, N0, EMVI – CRM clear, PSW negative
